extDescription.message: Blocks Reels on Facebook while keeping the main feed accessible.

popupSubtitle.message: Reels blocker with pause, lock, and schedule

popupStatusOutsideSchedule.message: Outside your schedule. Blocking will auto-enable during schedule.

popupStatusHardLockOn.message: Hard Lock is on. Pause is unavailable.

optionsSubtitle.message: Choose how strong the blocker should be, whether to use Hard Lock, and when blocking runs automatically.

optionsBlockingModeDescription.message: Pick what should happen when Facebook tries to show Reels.

optionsBlockingStrongDescription.message: Hides Reels buttons, blocks Reels links, and sends you back to Facebook Home if a Reels page opens.

optionsBlockingLightDescription.message: Only hides Reels buttons. If you open Reels directly, Facebook may still show it.

optionsPauseDescription.message: This sets how long the Pause button keeps blocking turned off.

optionsPauseHint.message: Pick any value from 5 to 180 minutes.

optionsExceptionsDescription.message: Allow Reels on specific pages or profiles by adding one rule per line.

optionsExceptionsHint.message: Rules can be full URLs, host/path patterns (facebook.com/page), or path prefixes (/your-profile).

optionsFrictionDescription.message: Add confirmation prompts before actions that can reduce blocking.

optionsConfirmDisableDescription.message: You will need to confirm before disabling the blocker.

optionsConfirmPauseDescription.message: You will need to confirm before pausing or resuming blocking.

optionsHardLockDescription.message: Hard Lock removes quick pause and can delay turning blocking off.

optionsHardLockEnableDescription.message: Pause is disabled while Hard Lock is on.

optionsHardLockCooldownHint.message: Set to 0 for instant off. Any higher value adds a countdown before blocking turns off.

optionsScheduleDescription.message: Automatically run blocking during selected days and hours.

optionsScheduleEnableDescription.message: When enabled, the schedule controls when blocking is active.

optionsScheduleDaysHint.message: For overnight schedules, choose the day when the schedule starts.

optionsErrorSelectScheduleDay.message: Select at least one day for schedule.
